label: Garden Brain — photo check-ups
items: Rhozly now looks at each new plant photo you journal overnight (Sage & Evergreen) — growth stage, health and plain-language findings appear right on the plant's photo timeline.
Photo check-ups can suggest real next steps — add a one-off task, run a Plant Doctor diagnosis, or keep a closer eye — and you apply or dismiss each with one tap.
If a photo shows a plant needing attention, it's flagged in your morning Daily Brief with a link straight to the photo.
Confident stage changes spotted in photos update the plant's growth stage automatically.

label: Daily Brief
items: Garden Brain suggestions in the brief now have a one-tap Apply — no need to hunt for the card on the dashboard.
